payload.title: fix: replace Google Maps link on contact page with embedded iframe map
payload.body: Contact page /contact had a plain text link to Google Maps instead of an embedded interactive map. Replace with a proper Google Maps iframe embed showing the Aura Medical Institute campus location at 10/6A, VKV Kumaraguru Nagar, Saravanampatti, Coimbatore.

evidence: views/public/contact.php: replaced 'View on Google Maps' link with <iframe> embed using maps.google.com/maps?q=...+output=embed
Map shows campus location at full width (100%), 400px height, with allowfullscreen and lazy loading
Link to open in Google Maps preserved below the embed
